text:
There was once a girl named Lily who loved collecting stories. With each book she read, she collected a story feather. One day, when she collected seventeen feathers, a big snowy owl stole them all! Determined to get them back, Lily followed the tracks—until she met an old owl.

"What happens to fancy feathers?"

"Liver them wise."

She stared into his wise old eyes. "Why?"

"The world's too loud. They don't listen."

She nodded. They slept together under a big owl tree.

Next morning, she woke up. Something was wrong.

"Oh no. Stars don't twinkle."

She flew out. Stars twinkled harder than ever. That night an owl owwed.

They both lived happily ever after. Even with fifty feathers.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
